_comment: Contexte pre-calcule par le director en debut de cycle. Lu par les agents a la place de tous les docs.
focus: landes_batch2 + T046 run summary + T047 card flip animation

selected_tasks.title: 20 landes_bruyere batch2 cards (anciens>=35%, druides<=3 cards, HEAL_LIFE<=5)
End-of-run summary overlay (life=0 or 30 cards played)

cycle16_completed.T045: biome toast 2s overlay on run start + entry

landes_batch2_brief.format: [{narrative: string, biome: string, options: [{verb, text, effects: string[]}x3]}, ...]
landes_batch2_brief.append_location: Before the final ] -- insert 20 new card objects with leading comma separator
landes_batch2_brief.themes: landes bruyere second batch: anciens-heavy. Themes: elder druids who have left the groves and now tend to moorlands; ancient megaliths on misty heaths; rites of autumn equinox on open landes; ancestors speaking through standing stones; wind-swept prophecies; burial mounds of forgotten kings; heather blooming under low clouds; travellers lost in fog; peat bogs preserving old memories; crossroads where ancestors linger.

constraints.effects_per_option: 1-3 effects, no option with 3+ negative effects

t046_brief.display: Overlay with: cards played count, faction rep gains (all 5), anam earned, biome reached
t046_brief.style: dark semi-transparent overlay, centered panel, Celtic-style header text, restart button
t046_brief.store_fields: store.getState(): run.cardsPlayed, run.biome, factions.{druides,anciens,korrigans,niamh,ankou}.reputation, run.anamEarned or accumulate from effects

t047_brief.trigger: every time a new card is displayed (card choice phase start)
t047_brief.animation: CSS rotateY 0->90deg (front disappears, 0.2s) then 90->0deg (back=content appears, 0.2s), total 0.4s
t047_brief.file: web-demo/src/ui/CardDisplay.ts or equivalent card rendering code
t047_brief.approach: add .card-flip class, CSS @keyframes flip, call .classList.add('card-flip') then remove after 400ms
